hero.feature1_desc: See the feeling and intent behind the message.
hero.feature2_desc: Get clear insight so you can respond with confidence.
hero.feature3_title: A Safe Space for Your Heart
hero.feature3_desc: Your most sensitive conversations stay private and secure.
hero.cta_desc: Advanced AI analysis to help you respond with empathy and confidence.

about.label: About Encantta
about.headline_part1: Most relationships don't break from a lack of love. They fade from
about.p1: Encantta gently analyzes your conversations to help you understand the emotions, intentions, and inner world of the people you love. Because when you understand how someone thinks and feels, you stop reacting — and start connecting.
about.p2: The quality of your life is shaped by the quality of your relationships. And the quality of your relationships is shaped by how well you understand one another.

footer.desc: Empowering your relationships with AI-driven empathy and understanding.
footer.designed_with: Designed with empathy. Built for deeper connections.

services.label: How Encantta Helps You
services.headline: Overthinking a Message?
services.item1_desc: Understand emotions beneath the surface, even when they’re not clearly expressed.
services.item2_desc: See what they really mean, not just what they say.
services.item3_desc: Craft thoughtful replies that build trust instead of tension.
services.item4_desc: Identify recurring dynamics and grow beyond them.

how_it_works.label: How It Works
how_it_works.headline_part1: A clear, simple process designed to
how_it_works.step1_desc: Paste the text, email, or conversation that's leaving you confused or overthinking.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Encantta analyzes the tone, context, and phrasing to reveal the true intentions behind the words.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Get tailored suggestions to craft the perfect reply and build stronger, healthier connections.

faq.label: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Encantta is an AI tool that helps you understand what’s really happening beneath your conversations. It looks at tone, wording, and emotional patterns to reveal what might be implied but not clearly said. Instead of overthinking, you get calm, structured clarity.
faq.a2: Yes, your conversations are handled securely and used only to generate your analysis. We don’t sell, share, or publicly store your messages. Your privacy and trust are always respected.
faq.a3: Encantta uses Gemini AI models to analyze your conversations, and you can choose which specific model is used for your analysis. Because communication is nuanced, you can comment on the analysis results if anything feels incomplete or slightly off. The system will then refine the results with your added context to provide deeper, more personalized insights.
faq.q4: Can I ask follow-up questions after the analysis?
faq.a4: Yes, you can continue the conversation after receiving your analysis. Our built-in chatbot lets you ask deeper questions, request clarification, or get help crafting a response. It’s designed to support you until you feel fully clear.
faq.q5: Will this help me improve my communication skills?
faq.a5: Yes, and that’s one of the biggest benefits. Over time, you’ll start recognizing emotional patterns and communication signals on your own. With practice, clarity turns into confidence and stronger real-life communication skills.
